english: resp. to go away, to depart, B. frq.; p̕ár bžud (phar bzhud) pray, go away! (opp. to tsúr-byoń (tsur byon)).
1. = γzúr-ba (gzur ba), bžár-ba (bzhar ba) Cs. — 2. to strain, filter, Sch.

pf. and imp. bžéńs (bzhengs) Glr., resp. for slóń-ba (slong ba), to raise, erect, set up, an image, temple; to manufacture, compose, sacred things, e.g. pictures, books; to draw up, frame, write, print, or cause it to be done; to found, endow, give, books to monasteries etc.

1. pf. of bžéń-ba (bzheng ba). — 2. resp. for láń-ba (lang ba) to rise, get up, intrs. to bžéń-ba (bzheng ba); also with yár(-la) (yar (-la)) Glr.; *nyi - ráń žáńs(-sa*)* (*nyi - rang zhangs (-sa*)*) W. are you risen? *žań(s)* (*zhang (s)*) please to get up!

I. vb., resp. for odód-pa ('dod pa), to wish, desire, rgyál-po γzigs bžéd-dam (rgyal po gzigs bzhed dam) does your Reverence wish to see the king? Dzl.; rgyál-po náń-du obyón-par-bžéd-pa-la (rgyal po nang du 'byon par bzhed pa la) as the king wished to enter Glr.; rta mi bžéd-na (rta mi bzhed na) if your Reverence does not wish to have the horse Mil.; in science: to accept, mǩán-pa p̕yí-ma-dag mi bžéd-pa legs (mkhan pa phyi ma dag mi bzhed pa legs) it is well that learned men of later times do not accept it, approve of it Gram.; to assert, maintain, so-sói bžéd-tsul máń-na yań (so so'i bzhed tshul mang na yang) although many different propositions are to be met with Wdk.; sńá - mas bžed (snga mas bzhed) earlier writers are of opinion, insist on Gram.; of letters: ga-op̕ul bžed (ga 'phul bzhed) certain letters require ga (ga) for a prefix Zam. — II. supposition, view, opinion Tar. 113, 21. — bžed-don (bzhed don) resp. wish, desire Cs., bžed - don ogrub (bzhed don 'grub) it happens according to one's wish, as one could wish Cs.

I. vb., resp. for lén-pa (len pa) to take, receive, accept; to seize, confiscate, B., C. (W. *nám-če* (*nam ce*) synon.); k̕áb-tu bžés-pa (khab tu bzhes pa) and žál-gyis bžés-pa (zhal gyis bzhes pa) v. k̕ab (khab) and žál (zhal); esp. at meals, to take, to eat, ji bžéd-pa bžes šig (ji bzhed pa bzhes shig) Dzl. please take whatever you like, bžés-na (bzhes na) if he would take it, if it should be to his liking Mil.; instead of lón-pa (lon pa) in: dgúń-lo bču-γnyís bžés-pa (dgung lo bcu gnyis bzhes pa) he got twelve years old. — II. sbst. food, meat, bžés-pa odréń-pa (bzhes pa 'dren pa) to offer, to serve up meat Mil., Pth. — Comp. *žē-ḍho* (*zhe dho*) C. food, sweet-meats (cf. gro (gro)) bžes-táń (bzhes tang) food (?) Sch. — *žē-ḍhúń* (*zhe dhung*) (?) Ts. beer. — *žē-bhág* (*zhe bhag*) C. bread — *žē-rág* (*zhe rag*) W. brandy. — *žē-hór* (*zhe hor*) C., hookah, oriental tobacco-pipe, the smoke of which passes through water.

(sometimes incorr. γžón-pa (gzhon pa)) vehiculum, riding - beast, carriage, vehicle; bžón-pa sòm-pa (bzhon pa som pa) to order the horses to be put to Dzl.; bžon-pas obrós-pa (bzhon pas 'bros pa) to take to flight in a vehicle or on horseback Dzl.; mi-sruń bžón-pa (mi srun bzhon pa) a not gentle riding-beast S.g.
milking cow Cs., bžon-p̕yugs (bzhon phyugs) milking cattle Glr.

1. the letter z, originally, and in the frontier-provinces to the present-day, sounding like the English z, in C. differing from ས, s (sa), only by the following vowel being deep-toned. — 2. numer. figure: 22.

Ld. any thing small, neat, elegant, of a miniature size, *pé-ča za žig* (*pe ca za zhig*) a little book, pocket-edition, *nod-čád za žig* (*nod cad za zhig*) a little pot or can, *čáń za žig* (*chang za zhig*) a drop of beer.
